name: esgames-plugins
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: journal
plugins.description: Conversational journaling assistant that interviews you about your day and saves a Markdown entry to documents/journal/

plugins.name: usability-report
plugins.description: Evaluates a target (URL, app, UI, or codebase) against Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics and generates a structured Markdown report with severity ratings and recommendations.
